title: Junior Business Development Manager at Embassy Office Parks REIT

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Embassy Office Parks REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
